_aspire_note: External caller-facing agent. Twilio-connected. Has 5-node ElevenLabs Workflow (Start -> Greeting & Identify Intent -> Answer FAQ / Transfer Call / Take Message -> Wrap Up -> End). Per-call personalization webhook keyed off called_number at /v1/sarah/personalization.
name: Aspire Sarah - Receptionist

_v1_sync.agent_id_resolved_note: Confirmed via mcp__elevenlabs__list_agents 2026-04-28. 'Aspire Sarah - Receptionist' = agent_6501. Previously believed agent_8901 was Receptionist — that is actually Front Desk Sarah (internal). agent_6501 has the Workflow tab.
_v1_sync.first_message: Good {{time_of_day}}, thank you for calling {{business_name}}. This is Sarah, how can I help you today?
